# gain

**Instance Property**

The amount of sound the source emanates.

## Declaration

```swift
var gain: Double { get set }
```

## Discussion

The framework clamps the value to the range between `0` and `1`, where `0` silences the audio and `1` doesn’t modify the audio’s original volume.
title: gain
